title: Newcastle United F.C. Kids Pyjamas + Hooded Dressing Gown3 Piece Nightwear Football Robe Pjs Set
description: NEWCASTLE UNITED FC 3 PIECE PYJAMA / HOODED ROBE SETIntroducing our officially licensed Newcastle United Football Club nightwear pyjama and hooded robe set, featuring a fresh new design for this season. A great value set to save you time and money – no need to search for matching pjs, we’ve got the perfect classic long pjs set with the ultimate football club hooded dressing gown. This set includes a cozy soft fleece robe, a stylish long sleeve top, and comfortable lounge pants. The robe is made from a super soft luxury fleece and includes a tie belt, hood and pockets for added warmth and practicality. The top showcases a high-quality print featuring official Newcastle FC branding, celebrating your favourite football club in style. The matching pants include a subtle club-themed print that complements the top perfectly, complete with an elasticated waistband for a comfy fit. Whether for bedtime or relaxing around the house, this set is perfect for young Newcastle FC fans of all ages. It’s also an excellent choice for birthday and Christmas gifts. We stock this set in a full size range from 5–6 years up to 13 years, ideal for matching siblings’ nightwear or friends’ sleepovers. Fully machine washable, this set combines team spirit, comfort, and convenience in one fantastic package.
